review_notes: EchoQuest is an audio-first interactive storytelling app. The AI Game Master is powered by the Anthropic Claude API (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY required in environment). To test core gameplay: tap 'Play a Story' on the home screen, select any campaign, create a character, then interact via text or voice. Subscription features (Storyteller/Creator) can be tested with the sandbox account below. Voice input uses on-device iOS speech recognition — microphone permission is requested on first use.
demo_notes: The demo account has Storyteller tier pre-activated so all premium features are accessible during review.
